title: Voluntary proceedings for dissolution; authorization; appointment of liquidators
doc_html:
§142.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1979, No. 773, §1, eff. July 20, 1979; Acts 1984, No. 487, §1; Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec. 31, 1989; Acts 2001, No. 1187, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
